summary: Frontend testing of 21 city pages with new 14-section layout. All tested cities work correctly EXCEPT /belvedere-tiburon-appliance-repair which redirects to service areas due to missing entry in VALID_CITIES. Alternative routes (/belvedere-appliance-repair and /tiburon-appliance-repair) work correctly. Non-city service page /refrigerator-repair correctly uses original template.

ui_bugs.issue: /belvedere-tiburon-appliance-repair redirects to /service-areas instead of showing city page. The slug 'belvedere-tiburon' is not in VALID_CITIES list (cities.js only has 'belvedere' and 'tiburon' separately)

action_items: FIX: Add 'belvedere-tiburon' slug to cities.js SERVICE_CITIES array OR modify CityRepairRoute.js to check CUSTOM_CITY_PAGES before VALID_CITIES validation
critical_code_review_comments: All 14 city sections render correctly with proper data-testid attributes
City-specific housing types data from cityLocalData.js loads correctly (waterfront for Sausalito, luxury estates for Ross, tract homes for Daly City)
Nearby Service Areas links use correct URLs from cityLocalData
Sticky BOOK REPAIR button appears after scrolling 300px
Mobile responsive rendering works (tested on 390x844 viewport)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested city pages in iteration 46: Daly City, Novato, Sausalito, Ross, Tiburon, Belvedere, Mill Valley, San Rafael, Pacifica, Fairfax. Also tested /refrigerator-repair to confirm NON-city template. Key data-testid attributes for city sections: city-intro, city-services, city-problems, city-process, city-pricing, city-availability, city-brands, city-housing, city-case-studies, city-testimonials, city-faq, city-nearby, city-final-cta, city-footer, city-sticky-book. The /belvedere-tiburon-appliance-repair URL fails but /belvedere-appliance-repair and /tiburon-appliance-repair work (all three render BelvedereTiburon component).

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In CityRepairRoute.js (lines 82-89), VALID_CITIES check happens BEFORE CUSTOM_CITY_PAGES check. VALID_CITIES is derived from cities.js which only has 'belvedere' and 'tiburon' as separate slugs, not 'belvedere-tiburon'. Since 'belvedere-tiburon' is not in VALID_CITIES, it redirects to /service-areas before reaching the CUSTOM_CITY_PAGES check where 'belvedere-tiburon' IS defined.
reproduction_steps: Page shows generic 'Expert Service Areas Repair in San Francisco' instead of Belvedere & Tiburon city page
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add { name: 'Belvedere Tiburon', slug: 'belvedere-tiburon', path: '/belvedere-tiburon-appliance-repair', region: 'North Bay' } to SERVICE_CITIES in cities.js
